use_case: A student wants a realistic weekly study schedule before exams.
trigger: Student provides syllabus and available hours.
steps: Parse syllabus topics, exam date, and time constraints.
Transform topics into weekly study blocks with durations.
Generate study_plan JSON and checkpoint summary fields.
Review load balance and adjust overbooked weeks.
Save approved plan payload for prototype rendering.
result: Structured plan JSON is produced with summary and study_plan arrays mapped to weekly sessions.
success_criteria: 100% of required plan fields are present and student accepts plan with no more than one manual adjustment.

use_case: A teacher wants rubric-aligned feedback ready in less time.
steps: Parse rubric criteria and submission evidence snippets.
Transform rubric rows into criterion_feedback objects.
Generate summary and per-criterion JSON comments.
Teacher reviews and edits only flagged criteria.
Publish approved feedback payload.
result: Structured feedback JSON is produced with criterion_feedback array and summary fields for each submission.
success_criteria: Feedback generation time is reduced by at least 30% while 100% rubric criteria are covered.

use_case: An admin wants early warnings for disengagement risk.
steps: Parse attendance and grade trend inputs by learner.
Transform risk indicators into tiered severity buckets.
Generate risk_flags and recommended_actions JSON.
Assign intervention owners from the generated list.
Log intervention outcomes for next review cycle.
result: Structured risk digest JSON is produced with risk_flags and recommended_actions arrays for admin review.
success_criteria: At least 95% of high-risk learners are assigned interventions within the defined SLA window.

use_case: A student wants lesson material transformed into practice assets quickly.
trigger: Student uploads lesson or picks source doc.
steps: Parse lesson text from uploaded or selected source.
Transform content into topic chunks for reuse.
Generate flashcards, quiz, and study_plan JSON blocks.
Inspect rendered outputs for structure completeness.
Save selected learning package output.
result: Structured learning package JSON is produced with summary, flashcards, quiz, and study_plan sections.
success_criteria: All four required sections are present and each section contains at least one valid item.

use_case: A teacher wants multilingual parent updates for class progress.
steps: Parse progress notes into key points and action items.
Transform message into selected target language.
Generate translated_message and quality_notes JSON.
Validate tone and readability against checklist.
Send finalized parent update.
result: Structured translation JSON is produced with translated_message text and quality_notes annotations.
success_criteria: Teacher sends message with no more than one manual correction in 90% of runs.

use_case: An admin wants policy answers with auditable citations.
trigger: A policy interpretation question is raised.
steps: Parse natural language query into policy retrieval intent.
Transform retrieved passages into citation candidates.
Generate answer, citations, and confidence JSON fields.
Review confidence threshold and cited evidence.
Record approved interpretation with trace references.
result: Structured policy response JSON is produced with answer text, citation list, and confidence score.
success_criteria: Median response time stays under 2 minutes and citation validity is at least 95% in spot checks.
